allow: PowerShell($response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://heovcenter.gov.taipei/cia/WebLayout/GetLastestAutoPumpPGInfo" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; $json = $response.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $stations = $json.d | ForEach-Object { $_.stationno }; Write-Output "Total stations: $\($stations.Count\)"; Write-Output \($stations -join ", "\))
